creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #16)
"Upstream made it clear that numpy 1 is no longer supported."

Thanks, Charlie.

There are degrees of "not supported", of course.  Do you have a reference to the upstream discussion / notes on that topic?  It looks like 2.0 was only tagged in June 2024, so for downstream consumers, that's not a particularly long time, especially if they weren't paying attention in June (or before).
